brand.name: EthioMLS
brand.tagline: Buy and rent verified property in Addis Ababa — for Ethiopian diaspora and global investors
brand.motto: A trustworthy foundation, for a better tomorrow.

home.lede: Verified homes, off-plan projects, and commercial spaces across Addis Ababa — in four languages.

filters.title: Filters
filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by area, project, or keyword

compliance.escrowBody: Buyer deposits are held in a locked bank account and released by verified construction milestones under Proclamation 1357/2024.
compliance.foreignClearanceBody: Residential purchases by foreign nationals follow Proclamation 1388/2025 clearance and investment rules.
compliance.offPlanWarningBody: Developer allocations for this off-plan property are locked in a closed bank escrow account. Funds are released only after certified construction stages are verified under Proclamation 1357/2024.

search.title: Tell us what you are looking for
search.lede: Answer three short prompts. Your budget stays balanced across ETB and USD using today’s NBE day-rate proxy.

prompts.cluster: Which Addis Ababa sub-city cluster do you prefer?

intent.buyHint: Completed or ready homes for sale

search.simpleLede: Choose intent, area, and budget — then browse matching homes.

completion.hint: Filters off-plan units and projects by verified construction progress.

ai.lede: Describe what you want in plain language — we will map it to intent, area cluster, and budget.
ai.placeholder: e.g. Looking to rent a 2-bedroom near Bole under 80,000 ETB/month
ai.error: Could not interpret that search. Try the fields above.

auth.title: Sign in to EthioMLS
auth.lede: Sign in with your Ethiopian mobile number and password. SMS verification is only required on new devices. Add email later in your profile.
auth.phoneHint: Local numbers only (+251 9… / +251 7…). International numbers are not accepted.
auth.codeSent: We sent a verification code by SMS.
auth.newDeviceHint: New device detected — enter the SMS code to finish signing in. Trusted devices skip this next time.
auth.mockHint: SMS is in mock mode — use the debug code below.

password.label: Password
password.hint: Min. 8 characters. SMS code is only required on new devices.
password.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

role.label: Your role
role.hint: Pick one role for this account. You cannot change it later.
role.required: Choose one role to create your account.
role.locked: Your role was set at signup and cannot be changed.
role.ownerHint: List your own home for sale or rent.

developer.hint: Business details are required to register as a developer.

rolesIndex.title: Choose your role
rolesIndex.lede: Client, broker, owner, developer, or admin — each hub highlights the tools you need.

client.title: Find your next home
client.lede: Browse verified listings and projects. Sign in to unlock contact numbers, visits, and 360° tours.

broker.title: List and manage inventory
broker.lede: Publish properties for clients, keep contacts ready for admin audit, and track the market from one place.

owner.title: Sell or rent your property
owner.lede: List your own home with photos and documents. Every submission waits for admin audit before it goes live.

developer.title: Showcase projects and off-plan units
developer.lede: Publish escrow-backed off-plan inventory with the full document pack: org credentials, floor plan, title or lease, permit, escrow letter, unit photos, and Fayda verify for your company rep.

admin.title: Audit and import the market
admin.lede: Scrape Telegram and websites, review pending listings, and publish only after the client-protection checklist passes.

developer.title: Publish escrow-backed inventory
developer.lede: Track readiness, submit the full document pack, and follow units through admin review from one place.
developer.readinessProfileNeeded: No developer profile yet — trade name and registration are collected on first inventory submit.
developer.readinessFaydaOk: Fayda eSignet verified for your account
developer.readinessFaydaNeeded: Fayda verify still needed (demo verify on the inventory form until RP credentials are live)
developer.packLede: Every unfinished unit needs org docs, floor plan, title or lease, MUD permit, escrow letter, photos, and Fayda — AI can prefill fields from uploads.
developer.packFayda: Fayda eSignet for the company representative
developer.pendingEmpty: No listings waiting for audit. Submit off-plan inventory to get started.
developer.publishedEmpty: Nothing published yet — approved inventory will appear here.

admin.title: Review, audit, and publish
admin.lede: Work the pending queue, clear collision alerts, and publish only after the client-protection checklist passes.
admin.checklistLede: Every approval must pass identity, ownership, price, location, media, permit, escrow, contact, and fraud screens.
admin.readyEmpty: Nothing audited yet — approve a pending listing to see it here.

adminAudit.title: Client-protection audit
adminAudit.lede: Complete every check and add notes before approving. Approval does not publish — use Publish after audit passes.
adminAudit.approvedReady: Audit passed — you can publish this listing.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.lede: Your Ethiopian mobile number is your login. Email is optional and used only for contact updates.
profile.phoneLocked: Phone is your sign-in ID and cannot be changed here.
profile.emailHint: Not required for signup — add it so we can reach you about listings and offers.

listingDetail.noPhone: No phone on file — admin will add one after audit.
listingDetail.signUpForContact: Sign up with your Ethiopian mobile number to see the contact phone and request a visit.
listingDetail.signUpForTour: Create a free account to open the 360° virtual tour.

imports.title: Import sources
imports.lede: Add public Telegram channels, Facebook Pages, or websites. Scraped posts become pending listings with contact numbers for admin audit before publication. East-corridor off-plan sources (Ayat, Temer, brokers) can be seeded and bulk-run with npm run scrape:offplan-ads.
imports.addLede: Paste a Telegram handle (e.g. @gechocommission8), a Facebook Page URL (facebook.com/YourPage), or a website URL. Tag east-corridor off-plan sources with notes containing east-offplan.
imports.label: Label (optional)
imports.notesPlaceholder: east-offplan · broker channel — audit contacts carefully
imports.cliHint: Bulk seed + scrape Ayat / Temer / east brokers: npm run scrape:offplan-ads
imports.empty: No sources yet. Add a Telegram channel, Facebook Page, or website above.

dashboard.title: Market desk
dashboard.lede: Live inventory health across Addis Ababa sub-cities, review queues, and Gemini translation coverage.

building.showreelHint: Drag to orbit · click a floor
building.scrollHint: Scroll the stack or tap a floor

listings.title: Listings
listings.lede: Browse verified homes and commercial spaces for sale or rent across Addis Ababa — built for diaspora buyers and investors worldwide.

projects.title: Projects
projects.lede: Track escrow-backed off-plan and under-construction projects in Addis Ababa with clear unit inventory.
projects.selectUnit: Inspect a floor, then select a unit to see MLS ID and property details.

developers.title: Developers
developers.lede: Explore verified corporate developers and licensed delala partners listing inventory for diaspora and investors on EthioMLS.
developers.emptyListings: No published properties for this developer yet.

inventory.heading: Unit inventory
inventory.lede: Projects and buildings grouped by unit type, with availability counts.

pages.comingOnline: Directory coming online — sample inventory below.
pages.emptyHint: Full catalogue connects when your PostgreSQL database is linked.
pages.emptyDirectory: No published records yet. Run `npx prisma db seed` to populate demo inventory.

consent.title: Consent to contact broker
consent.body: Broker telephone numbers stay masked for privacy. Confirm the Consent Gate to create a routed lead and unlock the contact line for this listing only.
consent.checkbox: I consent to share my enquiry and receive the broker contact details for this listing.
consent.mustTick: Tick the Consent Gate checkbox to continue.
consent.routeFailed: Could not complete secure lead routing.
